products.title: Sunwhite Calrose White Rice, 2kg
products.description:
About Sunwhite:
Sunwhite is proudly owned by SunRice in Australia. SunRice is a global food business and one of Australia’s branded food exporters.

Sunwhite is one of the world's branded rice food companies, supplying high quality and innovative rice food products in the Middle East.

Our proud history dates back to the establishment of a single rice mill in the Riverina region of New South Wales in 1950. Today, SunRice is a vertically integrated business, operating across the entire value chain, including state-of- the-art processing, packing and value adding food plants, as well as an animal feeds division, a dedicated rice research company and a sophisticated local grain storage network.

Innovation is the key to our success and our brands are recognized for their superior taste quality.

Product description:
Sunwhite Calrose Rice is a high-quality, medium-grain rice variety known for its excellent taste and versatility in various culinary preparations. Grown with care and expertise, this rice has a tender texture and absorbs flavors well, making it a popular choice for a wide range of dishes. Whether you're rustling up a hearty stew, a robust pasta sauce, or an indulgent dip, Zahrat Tomato Paste guarantees an extra dimension of flavor that enhances each meal, making it an indispensable addition to any kitchen.

How to Use:

- Use Zahrat Tomato Paste as a base for your favorite recipes to deepen flavor and produce a rich color.
- For a robust sauce, start by sautéing onions and garlic, then stir in 1-2 tablespoons of Zahrat Tomato Paste and cook until it turns a deep burgundy.
- For soups and stews, add Zahrat Tomato Paste to your broth and let it simmer, allowing the paste's flavor to permeate the dish.
- It can also be used as a delicious spread on sandwiches or as a pizza base for a tangy twist. 

Storage Instructions:

- Upon opening, immediately refrigerate Zahrat Tomato Paste to maintain its quality.
- Tightly seal the product after each use to extend its shelf life.
- Keep the tomato paste in the fridge for up to 30 days.
- You can freeze Zahrat Tomato Paste in an airtight container to prolong the shelf-life for up to 6 months.

Ingredients:

- Fresh, ripe tomatoes
- Sea salt

products.title: Sig Cucumber Melon 236 ML
products.description:
Product Description:
Unwind and refresh your senses with Sig Cucumber Melon 236 ML. This invigorating blend of crisp cucumber and sweet melon is meticulously crafted to offer a refreshing splash of serenity. This rejuvenating potion, presented in a compact and efficient 236 ML bottle, is perfect for both home and travel use. It's paraben-free and 100% vegan, ensuring safety and care for all skin types. Enriched with natural ingredients, this vibrant fusion gently cleanses and conditions the skin, leaving it impregnated with a lingering fragrance that reenergizes your aura.

How to Use:
1. Wet your skin in the shower or bath. 
2. Pour a generous amount of Sig Cucumber Melon onto a sponge, loofah, or directly into your hand.
3. Gently massage the lather over your body.
4. Rinse thoroughly with warm water.
5. Pat dry and follow up with a moisturizer to lock in hydration.

Storage Instructions:
1. Always keep the product capped when not in use.
2. Avoid storing in direct sunlight or near heat sources to maintain the efficacy of the ingredients.
3. Keep it in a cool, dry place, preferably below 30°C.
4. For optimal freshness and hygiene, use the product within 12 months of opening.

Ingredients:
1. Aqua (Water)
2. Sodium Laureth Sulfate
3. Cocamidopropyl Betaine
4. Parfum (Fragrance)
5. Sodium Chloride
6. Melon Extract
7. Cucumber Extract
8. Glycerin
9. Citric Acid
10. Sodium Benzoate
11. Potassium Sorbate.

Washing your face with soap is not enough. After washing your face twice, apply this Eskinol Deep Cleanser with cotton and you will still see some dirt on your skin. This Eskinol Deep Cleanser helps deep cleanse your face and get rid of all that stubborn dirt or make - up and gives you a smooth face. 

- Removes deep seated dirt, excess oil and make up with Micro-Cleanse Anti-bacterial Formula

Directions for use:
Moisten a cotton pad with Eskinol Deep Facial Cleaner and apply on face & neck. Repeat until no trace of dirt is seen on the cotton. Use it anytime, anywhere for crystal clear skin!

How to Use: 
- Start by splashing some water on your face.
- Apply a small amount of the Eskinol Refreshing Facial Deep Cleanser onto your palms.

products.title: Dove Fresh Cucumber Antiperspirant Stick 40 g
products.description:
Your delicate underarm skin deserves the same care you give the rest of your body. Dove Antiperspirant Deodorant Stick with Cucumber and Green Tea and moisturising cream gives long-lasting freshness, gentle underarm care, and superior odor protection day and night. When you use your deodorant, you want freshness that lasts with natural refreshing ingredients. This long-lasting 48-hour deodorant stick for women protects against odor no matter what the day brings. That's not all - enriched with ¼ moisturizers, this deodorant stick also cares for your skin while it protects against odor. Reliable long-lasting freshness will leave you feeling confident and clean - all day long. Infused with cucumber and green tea scent, this deodorant stick gives superior 48h odor protection with every application. For the most effective underarm care, avoid applying directly after shaving. With effective odor protection, the fresh scent of this deodorant will leave you feeling fresher for longer. Suitable for all skin types even sensitive skin. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people – and by 2030, it will have helped a quarter of a billion young people through educational programmes and resources. Have a go at using this deodorant stick on whenever you need a top-up of freshness. It’s small enough to carry with you wherever you go and its refreshing, subtle scent means it’s perfect for after work, after the gym, or just before you leave the house. So with all those soothing ingredients combined with dryness protection that lasts, what better way is there to start each day? Globally, Dove does not test deodorant on animals. For the last 30 years, Dove has used alternative non-animal methods to test the safety of its products.

How to Use: 
1. Ensure your underarm is clean and completely dry.
2. Twist the bottom of the Dove Antiperspirant stick to reveal a small amount of product.
3. Apply a thin layer of the antiperspirant to your underarms.
4. Allow the product to dry completely before getting dressed.

With the rich, creamy lather and delicate fragrance of Dove Deep nourishing and moisturising shower gel, you can transform every shower into a caring skin care ritual. Dove Refreshing Body Wash revitalizes your skin and senses with cucumber and green tea extracts while moisturising your skin. Dove Refreshing Body Wash reveals instantly softer skin with no parabens and sulfates and is a dermatologist-recommended body wash. Moisture Renew Blend helps renew the skin's natural moisture with long-lasting nourishment. Our Sulfate-free, microbiome-gentle, paraben free body wash with a fresh fragrance provides the skin softness we are all looking for. Made with 100% gentle cleansers, Dove Refreshing Body Wash is gentle to the skin’s microbiome, its living protective layer. It creates a rich lather that moisturises and replenishes skin while also leaving it to cleanse, revived, and refreshed. With naturally derived cleansers and skin-natural nutrients, we care about what goes into our body wash. Dove sulfate-free body wash is the #1 dermatologist recommended and microbiome gentle. Dove care goes further than moisturising body wash with PETA Cruelty-Free certification and 100% recycled plastic bottles.

How to Use: 
1. Wet your body completely under the shower.
2. Pour some Dove Cucumber & Green Tea Body Wash onto your hand or a shower puff.
3. Rub your hands together until the wash starts to lather, or use a shower puff to create a rich, creamy foam.
4. Apply all over your body, paying special attention to any dry areas.
5. Rinse off thoroughly with warm water.
6. Pat yourself dry and follow with your favorite Dove moisturizer for an enhancing moisturizing experience.

products.description:
Description:
Beesline Underarm Serum Spray with a fresh cucumber scent helps reduce underarm odor while supporting smoother-looking underarm skin. The lightweight serum-mist format dries quickly for comfortable everyday use without a greasy feel.

Benefits:
1- Helps reduce underarm odor and keeps you feeling fresh
2- Light serum-mist texture that dries quickly
3- Refreshing cucumber fragrance for daily wear
4- Supports smoother-looking underarm skin with continued use
5- Easy spray format for even application

How To Use:
1- Shake well before use.
2- Spray onto clean, dry underarms from a suitable distance.
3- Allow to dry completely before dressing.
4- Use daily or as needed.

Warnings:
1- For external use only.
2- Avoid contact with eyes; rinse thoroughly with water if contact occurs.
3- Do not apply to irritated or broken skin; avoid use immediately after hair removal if it causes irritation.
4- Discontinue use if redness or itching occurs and consult a professional if irritation persists.
5- Keep out of reach of children.
6- Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
7- Spray precaution: do not inhale directly and avoid spraying near the face.

products.description:
Dove Deeply Nourishing Hand Wash for hands that feel soft and smooth every time after washing, try Dove Original Beauty Cream Hand Wash, with ¼ moisturising cream for a soothing sensation. We all know how important it is to take good care of our hands, especially when they’re feeling dry or chapped. To transform your daily hand washing routine into an act of beauty and love for your skin, simply dispense a pump of Dove handwash onto your wet palms, massage the rich lather into your hands before rinsing thoroughly. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse well with water.

Aqua• Sodium Laureth Sulfate• Glycerin• Cocamidopropyl Betaine• Sodium chloride• Parfum• Glycol Distearate• Citric acid• Sodium benzoate• Cocamide MEA• Tetrasodium EDTA• Benzyl alcohol• Hexyl Cinnamal• Limonene• Linalool.

STORAGE INSTRUCTIONS:
Store in a cool and dry place, away from the sunlight



How to Use: 
1. Wet your hands with clean, running water (warm or cold).

4. Rinish thoroughly under running water.
5. Dry your hands thoroughly using a clean towel or air-dry them.

products.title: Amul Pasteurised Salted Butter, 100g
products.description:
Description:
Amul is synonymous with butter in India. Several generations of Indian consumers have grown up with the taste of Amul Butter for six decades. The utterly butterly delicious taste of Amul Butter is a must on the breakfast table of almost every Indian household. The utterly cute Amul Butter Girl has been a part of Indian consumers since 1950. Amul Butter topical is recognised as one of the longest-running advertisement campaigns in the world.

Creamy Amul Pasteurised Butter, a hallmark of perfection in every spread. Crafted from the finest milk, its rich, smooth texture melts effortlessly on warm toast or enriches culinary creations with a luxurious touch. Elevate every meal with the unmistakable taste of Amul, cherished for its unmatched quality and wholesome goodness.
How to use:
Butter is one ingredient that is absolutely essential in every kitchen. This cooking essential is a favourite among chefs for its smooth, rich taste. No baking can be done without dollops of butter; cakes, cookies, and pastries need to have butter as one of the key ingredients. The waxy texture of butter also helps to make the upper layer of roasts and pies crispy and crunchy. |

products.title: Earth'S Finest Organic Coconut Butter, 200Ml
products.description:
Product Description:
Discover the rich, creamy decadence of Earth's Finest Organic Coconut Butter. Sourced from the finest organically-grown coconuts, this 200ml jar of pure wholesome goodness is not only delicious but brims with numerous healthful qualities. Packed with natural nutrients, it serves as a reliable source of energy and provides essential fatty acids. Its pure formulation ensures it is dairy-free, gluten-free, and vegan-friendly, making it a versatile addition to your diet. Whether you're using it in your favorite dishes, smoothies, or even as a dairy substitute, this organic coconut butter will imbibe a distinctive flavor that is bound to tantalize your taste buds.

How to Use:
- Take the required amount of Earth's Finest Organic Coconut Butter and let it reach room temperature.
- Stir well before using as natural separation may occur.

products.title: Aashirvaad Whole Wheat Atta, 1kg
products.description:
Launched on 27th May 2002, Aashirvaad Whole Wheat Atta has now become number one in branded packaged atta across the country. Behind every Aashirvaad pack are the Indian farmers and Aashirvaad experts who’ve made the atta with extra care. Aashirvaad prides itself in making 100% pure whole wheat atta with all its natural dietary fibres intact which ensures that you and your family receive optimum nutrition for a healthy life. Directly sourced from a wide network of Indian rural farmers, Aashirvaad Superior MP Atta is Made in India. They are showered with just the right amount of rain and sun-kissed to perfection which allow the grains to be heavy on the palm and amber in colour. The grain produce goes through a 3-step cleaning process that ensures the best quality of wheat grains. These expertly sourced grains undergo mechanised packaging that ensures zero human contact and 100% safety. To ensure the retention of the wheat’s high nutritional value, the grains are ground using the traditional ‘chakki’ method. This helps locking-in the highest nutritional value in the whole wheat flour. The dietary fibres and natural nutrients help in easy digestion and supporting immunity which are essential for your family’s daily intake. The dough made from Aashirvaad Superior MP Atta absorbs more water which makes sure that the rotis remain softer for a longer period. You and your family can lead a fit and healthier lifestyle as you enjoy soft, fluffy and delicious rotis from this naturally protein rich whole wheat atta

How to Use:
Use to make rotis and other Indian breads.
